supply_chain.dependencies: Dependence on third-party cloud hosting services including AWS and Microsoft Azure for hosting customer platforms and internal operations
risks: Reliance on third-party cloud infrastructure providers (AWS, Microsoft) for hosting services
Potential service disruptions or performance issues from third-party providers
Vendor lock-in risks with cloud providers
Minimum usage commitments with cloud providers ($1.95 billion commitment with one provider through 2033)
Third-party software and hardware dependencies across broad ecosystem
Supply chain vulnerabilities in customer environments and edge deployments
Cybersecurity risks from third-party vendors and supply chain attacks

regulatory_risks: Complex and evolving U.S. and non-U.S. laws regarding privacy, data protection and security (GDPR, CCPA, CPRA)

State-level comprehensive consumer privacy legislation (Connecticut, Virginia, Colorado, Utah, Florida, Montana, Oregon, Texas, Tennessee, Iowa, Delaware, New Hampshire, New Jersey, Maryland, Minnesota, Nebraska, Indiana, Kentucky, Rhode Island)
EU AI Act (EU AIA) imposing obligations on AI-related systems
Colorado Consumer Protections for Artificial Intelligence bill for high-risk AI systems
Export control regulations (EAR, ITAR) for software and technology
U.S. sanctions and economic sanctions laws
Foreign investment screening and regulatory review requirements
Government procurement regulations and compliance requirements
Federal Acquisition Streamlining Act (FASA) compliance
Anti-corruption laws (FCPA, U.K. Bribery Act, U.S. domestic bribery statute, Travel Act)
Cybersecurity risk management and disclosure rules (SEC requirements)
Data breach notification requirements
Intellectual property regulations and patent laws
Securities laws and regulations (Securities Act, Exchange Act)
Antitrust/competition law requirements
Employment laws and regulations in multiple jurisdictions
Tax regulations including GILTI, OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax
Inflation Reduction Act provisions (15% minimum tax, 1% excise tax on share repurchases)
Government contract-specific regulations (Truth in Negotiations Act, organizational conflicts of interest rules)
Classified information and national security clearance requirements
FedRAMP, IL2, IL4, IL5, IL6 authorization requirements
Foreign data transfer restrictions and adequacy decisions
Encryption technology export/import regulations
AI ethics and governance requirements

sanction_risks: Russia-Ukraine conflict and related economic sanctions against Russia and Belarus
Export control restrictions against Russia, Belarus, and certain regions of Ukraine
Potential wider sanctions if Russia-Ukraine conflict escalates
Risk of being denied export privileges or subjected to fines for sanctions violations
Restrictions on technology transfer to sanctioned countries
Potential sanctions on customers or partners in high-risk jurisdictions
